news.title:
M&M, Adani Green Energy, and L&T among stocks in focus amid weak market sentiment due to Middle East tensions.
Adani Green's capacity grew 35% YoY; L&T Realty acquired 100% in International Green Scapes. Muthoot Finance announced ₹30/share dividend.
news.summary:
M&M, Adani Green Energy, and L&T among stocks in focus amid weak market sentiment due to Middle East tensions.
Adani Green's capacity grew 35% YoY; L&T Realty acquired 100% in International Green Scapes. Muthoot Finance announced ₹30/share dividend.

news.title:
Adani Green Energy reports 28% YoY growth in units generated for FY26.
Revenue grew 23% YoY to ₹9,495 Cr; EBITDA rose 22% YoY with 92% margin.
news.summary:
Adani Green Energy reports 28% YoY growth in units generated for FY26.
Revenue grew 23% YoY to ₹9,495 Cr; EBITDA rose 22% YoY with 92% margin.

news.title: Adani Green's subsidiary forms a joint venture with Minerva Holding RSC.
news.summary: Adani Green's subsidiary forms a joint venture with Minerva Holding RSC.

news.title:
Adani Green Energy's subsidiary, AGEL UAE, signed a JV agreement with Minerva for renewable energy projects in India.
AGEL UAE will hold a 20% stake in JVCo, with Minerva appointing 4 directors and AGEL UAE appointing 1.
news.summary:
Adani Green Energy's subsidiary, AGEL UAE, signed a JV agreement with Minerva for renewable energy projects in India.
AGEL UAE will hold a 20% stake in JVCo, with Minerva appointing 4 directors and AGEL UAE appointing 1.

news.title:
Adani Green Energy shows bullish momentum, with support at ₹1,000-₹980 and potential to hit ₹1,200.
Strong fundamentals, revenue growth, and reduced debt bolster investor confidence; aligns with clean energy goals.
news.summary:
Adani Green Energy shows bullish momentum, with support at ₹1,000-₹980 and potential to hit ₹1,200.
Strong fundamentals, revenue growth, and reduced debt bolster investor confidence; aligns with clean energy goals.

news.title: Two Point Zero Group unit signs JV deal with Adani Green Energy Ltd for renewable energy projects in India.
news.summary: Two Point Zero Group unit signs JV deal with Adani Green Energy Ltd for renewable energy projects in India.

news.title:
Adani Green directors to seek dismissal of SEC complaint in NY court.
Gautam and Sagar Adani to act by April 30, 2026, per exchange filing.
news.summary:
Adani Green directors to seek dismissal of SEC complaint in NY court.
Gautam and Sagar Adani to act by April 30, 2026, per exchange filing.

news.title:
Adani Green Energy clarifies SEC complaint involves no company charges or bribery allegations.
The company plans to seek dismissal of the case by April 30, 2026.
news.summary:
Adani Green Energy clarifies SEC complaint involves no company charges or bribery allegations.
The company plans to seek dismissal of the case by April 30, 2026.

news.title:
Gautam Adani to request U.S. judge to dismiss SEC civil fraud case.
Case involves alleged bribery scheme, as per Adani's lawyers.
news.summary:
Gautam Adani to request U.S. judge to dismiss SEC civil fraud case.
Case involves alleged bribery scheme, as per Adani's lawyers.

news.title:
Adani Group firms, including Adani Green, Power, and Ambuja Cements, will release Q4 results in April.
Ambuja's Q4 profit may drop 39% YoY but rise 112% sequentially; no dividend news for FY26 yet.
news.summary:
Adani Group firms, including Adani Green, Power, and Ambuja Cements, will release Q4 results in April.
Ambuja's Q4 profit may drop 39% YoY but rise 112% sequentially; no dividend news for FY26 yet.

news.title:
Adani seeks US court dismissal of SEC fraud case, citing lack of jurisdiction and flawed claims regarding Adani Green Energy's 2021 bond sale.
Defendants argue no US securities law violations occurred as bonds were sold overseas, fully repaid, and bribery claims lack credible evidence.
news.summary:
Adani seeks US court dismissal of SEC fraud case, citing lack of jurisdiction and flawed claims regarding Adani Green Energy's 2021 bond sale.
Defendants argue no US securities law violations occurred as bonds were sold overseas, fully repaid, and bribery claims lack credible evidence.

news.title:
Adani Green Energy surged 23.2x in volume to 72.71L shares, up 6.2% to Rs.908.2.
Zydus Wellness saw a 17.2x volume rise to 6.87L shares, up 12% to Rs.497.25.
news.summary:
Adani Green Energy surged 23.2x in volume to 72.71L shares, up 6.2% to Rs.908.2.
Zydus Wellness saw a 17.2x volume rise to 6.87L shares, up 12% to Rs.497.25.

news.title:
Diamond Power secures Rs 163 cr orders from Adani group, including Rs 43.3 cr from Adani Power and Rs 100.5 cr from Adani Electricity.
The company saw Q3 FY26 net profit jump 693% to Rs 49.72 cr, driven by a 54.2% sales surge to Rs 474.08 cr.
news.summary:
Diamond Power secures Rs 163 cr orders from Adani group, including Rs 43.3 cr from Adani Power and Rs 100.5 cr from Adani Electricity.
The company saw Q3 FY26 net profit jump 693% to Rs 49.72 cr, driven by a 54.2% sales surge to Rs 474.08 cr.

news.title:
Adani Green Energy saw an NSE block trade for ~5.3M shares at Rs. 825.3.
The trade was valued at Rs. 437.2 crore, highlighting significant investor activity.
news.summary:
Adani Green Energy saw an NSE block trade for ~5.3M shares at Rs. 825.3.
The trade was valued at Rs. 437.2 crore, highlighting significant investor activity.

news.title:
Adani Green Energy added 5 GW renewable capacity in FY26, excluding China.
Total capacity is 19.3 GW, with 36M tonnes carbon offset and 1,376 MWh storage.
news.summary:
Adani Green Energy added 5 GW renewable capacity in FY26, excluding China.
Total capacity is 19.3 GW, with 36M tonnes carbon offset and 1,376 MWh storage.

news.title: Adani Green engages external contractors for the first time to support its expansion.
news.summary: Adani Green engages external contractors for the first time to support its expansion.

news.title:
Adani Green Energy taps external contractors, including L&T, Sterling & Wilson, and KPI Green, for expansion.
Shares fell 3.1% to ₹806.8 on BSE; market capitalization at ₹1.33 trillion amid broader renewable stock pullback.
news.summary:
Adani Green Energy taps external contractors, including L&T, Sterling & Wilson, and KPI Green, for expansion.
Shares fell 3.1% to ₹806.8 on BSE; market capitalization at ₹1.33 trillion amid broader renewable stock pullback.

news.title:
Adani Green Energy's board to meet on April 24, 2026, for FY26 financial results.
Trading window will be closed from April 1-26, 2026; investor call scheduled on April 24, 2026.
news.summary:
Adani Green Energy's board to meet on April 24, 2026, for FY26 financial results.
Trading window will be closed from April 1-26, 2026; investor call scheduled on April 24, 2026.

news.title:
Adani Green Energy operationalized 951 MW renewable projects in Rajasthan and Gujarat.
Total operational capacity reached 18,933.3 MW; plants to begin operations from March 30, 2026.
news.summary:
Adani Green Energy operationalized 951 MW renewable projects in Rajasthan and Gujarat.
Total operational capacity reached 18,933.3 MW; plants to begin operations from March 30, 2026.

news.title:
Bombay HC rejected Adani Green Energy's request for a CBI bribery probe.
The decision prevents escalation of the bribery case to central investigation.
news.summary:
Bombay HC rejected Adani Green Energy's request for a CBI bribery probe.
The decision prevents escalation of the bribery case to central investigation.
